title: Gold Standard to Launch Digital Platform to Make Assurance Process Simpler and More Efficient
content: Gold Standardâ€™s upcoming digital assurance platform, launching in December 2024, is set to simplify and speed up the certification process for carbon offset projects. By integrating with tools like the SDG Impact tool and dMRV program, this platform will allow project developers to submit projects online and access enhanced support resources. Reviews by approved Validation and Verification Bodies (VVBs) will maintain high standards of accuracy and compliance, while expanded flexibility will support diverse sustainable finance options, including climate bonds and funds. With added expert reviewers and training for VVBs, the platform aims to meet rising demand with efficiency, transparency, and adaptability in climate impact certification.
author: Analysts Account
